response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of broad software engineering experience and demonstrates genuine staff-level seniority, but the role demands 8+ years of production-grade AI delivery and he shows only shallow, recent AI exposure limited to MCP code generators in his current role. Python — the lingua franca of AI/ML work — is absent from his skills list entirely. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, observability frameworks for AI systems, or multi-agent orchestration (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.), which are all core to the job description. His cloud experience is narrow (AWS CDK for pricing logic at Optilyz) and his data pipeline work lacks the unstructured/ML-data dimension the role requires. The teaching and mentoring track record is a genuine positive, but it cannot compensate for the fundamental gap between a generalist systems background and the deep, applied GenAI delivery expertise this staff-level customer-facing role requires.
strengths: Long staff-level career with demonstrated mentorship, workshops, and engineering-culture initiatives that align with the role's coaching and engineering-excellence responsibilities
Current hands-on work with Model Context Protocol (MCP) infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq shows direct entry-point relevance to the AI-agent domain
Strong TypeScript/Node.js depth and prior AWS CDK usage provide a credible cloud-native engineering foundation to build on
concerns: Python is completely absent from the skills list, which is a critical disqualifier for a role centred on AI/ML engineering where Python is the dominant ecosystem
No demonstrable experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation, or observability pipelines for AI systems — all of which are listed as required qualifications

The stated 8-year production-AI requirement is unmet: the candidate's AI exposure is limited to the most recent role (April 2025–present), with the preceding 15 years spent on traditional web, embedded, and data-integration work

key_factors.factor: No RAG / vector DB / LLM eval experience
